name: Dome
description: Shaded half-domes capping each cell, the hood turning to a new edge on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 10%; bottom: 6%; width: 80%; height: 80%; border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); box-shadow: inset calc(10px / @Y) calc(-8px / @Y) calc(20px / @Y) rgba(0,0,0,0.36), inset calc(-8px / @Y) calc(8px / @Y) calc(16px / @Y) rgba(255,255,255,0.42); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
